subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-05-13
subcodes.first_line: India had a great civilization in former times. That civilization spread from that part of Asia to Syria and Egypt
subcodes.first_line_orig: هندوستان در زمان قدیم خیلی ترقی داشت از قطعهٴ آسیا مدنیت بمصر و سوریه سرایت کرد
subcodes.subjects: @coming-of-age; maturity of mankind, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @universal peace; world unity
